name: English Beef Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place steak cubes in a crock-pot.
3. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; toss with steak to coat thoroughly.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except Biscuit Topping and mix thoroughly.
5. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 10 hours.
6. One hour before serving, remove meat and vegetables from crock-pot.
7. Pour into a shallow 2-1/2-quart baking dish.
8. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 C).
9. Cover meat mixture with Biscuit Topping.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
BISCUIT TOPPING INSTRUCTIONS:
2 cups Flour
1 tsp Salt
3 tsp Baking Powder
1/4 cup Shortening
1/4 cup Milk
Mix dry ingredients. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Add milk all at once; stir well. Pat out on a floured board and roll out to cover the baking dish.
